message:
release: beads v1.0.2 — npm provenance URL fix

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,12 @@ and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0
 
 ## [Unreleased]
 
+## [1.0.2] - 2026-04-15
+
+### Fixed
+
+- **npm publish: provenance validation** — `npm-package/package.json` `repository.url`, `bugs.url`, and `homepage` updated from `steveyegge/beads` to `gastownhall/beads` so that npm's sigstore provenance validator accepts the published artifact. The repo move in v1.0.0 left these URLs stale, which caused npm publishes for v1.0.0 and v1.0.1 to be rejected after provenance check (E422).
+
 ## [1.0.1] - 2026-04-15
 
 ### Added

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "beads",
   "description": "AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.",
-  "version": "1.0.1",
+  "version": "1.0.2",
   "author": {
     "name": "Steve Yegge",
     "url": "https://github.com/steveyegge"

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
   <assemblyIdentity
     type="win32"
     name="beads.bd"
-    version="1.0.1.0"
+    version="1.0.2.0"
     processorArchitecture="*"/>
   <description>beads - AI-supervised issue tracker</description>
   <compatibility xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:compatibility.v1">

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [project]
 name = "beads-mcp"
-version = "1.0.1"
+version = "1.0.2"
 description = "MCP server for beads issue tracker."
 readme = "README.md"
 requires-python = ">=3.10"

@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@
 beads (bd) issue tracker functionality to MCP Clients.
 """
 
-__version__ = "1.0.1"
+__version__ = "1.0.2"
